services.name: AI Chatbot & Agent Development
services.target_client: Businesses wanting 24/7 customer support or internal automation
services.description: Custom AI chatbots and autonomous agents built with OpenAI Agents SDK, RAG pipelines, and MCP tools. From simple FAQ bots to multi-channel omnichannel agents.
deliverables: Production-ready AI agent or chatbot with your knowledge base
RAG pipeline connected to your documents and data
Deployment to your preferred platform (Vercel, Railway, or cloud)

services.name: Business Automation
services.target_client: Small businesses spending hours on repetitive manual tasks
services.description: End-to-end automation systems using Python, n8n, and AI agents. Automate email processing, report generation, data pipelines, and routine workflows so your team focuses on what matters.
deliverables: Automated workflow replacing your most time-consuming manual process
Monitoring dashboard and alerting for the automation
Documentation and handover so your team can manage it

services.name: Full-Stack Web Apps
services.target_client: Startups and SMEs needing custom web applications
services.description: Complete web applications built with Next.js and FastAPI. From SaaS dashboards to internal tools, delivered with TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and production CI/CD on Vercel + Railway.
deliverables: Fully functional web app with frontend and backend
PostgreSQL database with proper schema and migrations
CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions and auto-deployment

services.name: RAG / Knowledge Base Systems
services.target_client: Companies wanting AI that answers from their own data
services.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems that give AI accurate, grounded answers from your company documents, FAQs, and knowledge bases — without hallucination.
deliverables: Vector database populated with your company's knowledge
AI query interface returning grounded, cited answers
Update pipeline so new documents are indexed automatically
